key.name: terminal-command
key.description: Command used to open the project in terminal. %s will be replaced by the project path.

key.name: polling-interval
key.description: Interval in seconds between status checks after a server start/stop action.

key.name: status-check-timeout
key.description: Maximum seconds to poll for a server state change before reverting the optimistic UI update.

key.name: proxy-startup-timeout
key.description: Seconds to poll for proxy becoming active after system startup. 0 disables startup polling.

key.name: show-php-version
key.description: Whether to show the PHP version in the menu.

key.name: favorite-servers
key.description: List of server directory paths marked as favorites.
